description:
Court records. Dated Nisan 1093 CE. Including:
(1) A case involving Yaʿaqov b. Yefet and Ṣedaqa al-[...]. 1 dinar is to be repaid by Pesaḥ. 
(2) The wife of Abū l-Faḍl b. Mardūkh did not receive support for the baby girl until Pesaḥ as was stipulated on the day of their divorce. She 'cried out to the Jews' for help, and they sat/assembled and issued payments for the girl of 1/2 dirham a day. 
(3) Yaʿaqov al-Shaʿʿāb sued his in-laws for 3 dinars. 
(4)  Abū Saʿd b. Avraham ha-Levi agrees not to not insult his wife. 
(Information from Goitein's index cards.)
description_he: פרוטוקולי בית דין; מתוארכים לניסן 1093 לספירה; כולל: סכסוך חוב; אי-תשלום מזונות; תביעה נגד חמות; הסכם אי-עלבון בין בעל לאשה
